meaning: 拜罗伊特[德意志联邦共和国东南部城市]
examples: Bruno Glaser, a soil scientist of the University of Bayreuth, has studied unexpected patches of fertile soils in the central Amazon.
Today, a festival of Wagner's operas is held in Bayreuth every year.
He welcomed Jewish performers to Bayreuth, and enjoyed the tuneful, popular music of Verdi and Donizetti.
The University of Bayreuth decided that Mr Guttenberg had "violated scientific duties to a considerable extent".
Naturally Wolfgang rejects all talk of a Bayreuth crisis and in one sense he is right.
